create.prompt:
Use case: homepage branding logo animation
Primary request: Create a restrained premium shimmer homepage logo animation from the reference image.
Scene/background: same ausos gradient card from the input reference
Subject: the exact white ausos icon and wordmark from the reference
Action: subtle premium shimmer in the gradient field, like a soft interface hover state; the logo stays sharp, centered, and unchanged
Camera: locked-off, flat front view
Lighting/mood: diffuse glassy glow, restrained and refined
Color palette: cyan, mint, lavender, peach, white
Timing/beats: 4 seconds, slow shimmer that can loop
Constraints: the logo and brand typography must remain identical to the reference image, with no changes to glyphs, icon, white color, or placement
Avoid: no new interface elements, no additional text, no icon distortion, no text wobble, no flashing, no fast movement
